headline: Federated Learning
description: Federated Learning (FL) trains ML models across decentralized devices holding local data, without centralizing the data. Devices train locally, share only model updates (not raw data) with a central server, which aggregates updates. Used by Google (Gboard keyboard) and Apple for privacy-preserving ML.

citation.name: Communication-Efficient Learning of Deep Networks from Decentralized Data
citation.author: McMahan, H. Brendan, Moore, Eider, Ramage, Daniel, Hampson, Seth, Aguera y Arcas, Blaise
